_about: Baseline for the KEYED nightly live blind judges (.github/workflows/live-judge.yml). NEVER blocks a PR — the offline eval/quality_gate.py is the hard CI bar. `prior` is the previous loop's measured live score (original 6 cases, Vertex); `measured` is THIS loop's keyed run on the held-out 18-case eval split (Vertex, 2026-06-17); `target` is this loop's goal. Author and judge share a provider model (partial self-grading) — the per-point rubric grounding mitigates this and the offline gate is judge-independent. Reports: eval/CASE_TEXT_JUDGE_REPORT_2026-06-17_loop2-eval.md, eval/CASE_IMAGE_JUDGE_REPORT_2026-06-17_loop2-eval.md.

structures_at_risk_overall_out_of_10.note: abstract anatomy_map node-scatter (fig-02) — the documented ceiling. This keyed run graded the deterministic/LLM-authored SCHEMATICS, NOT the WS-4 retrieved real-anatomy plate (live_image_judge.py calls generate_case_figures with no figret, and no figure corpus is configured here). WS-4's plate raises this only when a textbook figure corpus is present.
